title: OREGON HEALTH PLAN APPLICATION ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: MALHEUR COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT OREGON HEALTH PLAN APPLICATION ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Trained community partners help individuals fill out an application for Oregon Health Plan (OHP). 1108 SW 4th Street Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Age 19-64 and low income households Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm (541) 889-7279 .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 889-7279 Lisa Almaraz [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Income and deduction information, birthdates for everyone applying, Social Security number for those who have one, Alien Resident number for those who have one, information about health insurance available to you through an employer LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation services by arrangement AREA SERVED: Malheur County Services: Medicaid Information/Counseling Navigator Programs Personal Health Care Advocate Services Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME VISITING PROGRAMS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC SAFETY - CHILD PASSENGER SAFETY SEAT INSPECTIONS SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MALHEUR COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT
